content.content: I bought running shoes today but I'm not sure if I applied the discount. If not, could you refund that order and rebuy them for me using my available discount?

Post that, I can retrieve the invoice to determine whether a discount was applied. If it turns out no discount was applied, I can then initiate a refund for that order. Lastly, I will check for any available discounts and search for the running shoes to proceed with the rebuy. 
</function_thought>
